zh.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules是Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon和Alberade d'Avranches的女兒，出生在法國諾門迪艾布利奧安。她和William FitzWimund d'Avranches至少有1個兒子。她去世於1142年8月24日在英國戴文奧可哈普頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meules

variants.name: Moles
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules was born in Brionne, Eure, Normandy, France as the daughter of Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon and Alberade d'Avranches. She had at least 1 son with William FitzWimund d'Avranches. She died on 24 August 1142, in Okehampton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules est née à Brionne, Eure, Normandie, France, fille de Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon et Alberade d'Avranches. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William FitzWimund d'Avranches. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1142, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules wurde in Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon und Alberade d'Avranches geboren. Sie hatte mit William FitzWimund d'Avranches mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. August 1142 in Okehampton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules è nata il nel Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Francia come figlia di Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon e Alberade d'Avranches. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William FitzWimund d'Avranches. Morì il 24 agosto 1142, nel Okehampton, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilda de MeulesはフランスノーマンディエウアブリオンでBaldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of DevonとAlberade d'Avranchesの娘として生まれた。彼女はWilliam FitzWimund d'Avranchesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1142年8月24日にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules(은)는 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브리오니에서 Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon(와)과 Alberade d'Avranches의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 William FitzWimund d'Avranches(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1142년 8월 24일 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules nasceu em Brionne, Eure, Normandie, França filha de Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon e Alberade d'Avranches. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com William FitzWimund d'Avranches. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1142, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Meules родилась в местности брионн, эур, норманди, Франция. Её родителей звали Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon и Alberade d'Avranches. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William FitzWimund d'Avranches. Она умерла 24 августа 1142 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия.
